name: Ultimate Fire Formation - Seito
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>舞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－「<ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>セイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>斗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>」
desc: Banish 7 "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap Cards from your Graveyard; Special Summon as many "Fire Fist" monsters as possible from your Graveyard, then you can Set "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap Cards directly from your Deck, except "Ultimate Fire Formation - Seito", up to the number of monsters Special Summoned by this effect.
eff: Banish 7 "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap Cards from your Graveyard; Special Summon as many "Fire Fist" monsters as possible from your Graveyard, then you can Set "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap Cards directly from your Deck, except "Ultimate Fire Formation - Seito", up to the number of monsters Special Summoned by this effect.
